## Description
Describe the changes made in this Pull Request and their motivation.

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the code style of this project.
- [ ] I have formatted my code using `cargo fmt` (for Rust changes).
- [ ] My changes do not trigger any compiler warnings or lint errors.
- [ ] I have tested my changes locally on a real or simulated VPS.
- [ ] I have updated the documentation / README if applicable.

## Related Issues
Closes #[Issue Number] (if applicable)

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update / Code formatting

## Screenshots (if applicable)
Add visual screenshots showing layout/UI changes.
